metaTitle: Sheng Ji Price & Cost: RMB 72,000 vs RMB 500,000 Explained
metaDescription: Sheng Ji has two packages: 5-Year Experience (RMB 72,000, no Taiwan travel needed) and Lifetime Premium (RMB 500,000, exclusive plot, attend in person). Taiwan 3-generation lineage. WeChat NSDG521.
metaKeywords: Sheng Ji price, Sheng Ji cost, Zhong Sheng Ji fee, living tomb ritual cost, Malaysia Singapore Sheng Ji price
h1: Sheng Ji Price & Cost: 5-Year vs Lifetime Package — Full Breakdown
heroSub: Transparent pricing, no hidden fees — all enquiries handled by Mr. Liang Dongrong, the sole authorised agent

items.h3: 5-Year Experience Package: RMB 72,000 (Most Popular for Overseas Clients)
items.content: Total fee: RMB 72,000 (approx. MYR 45,000 / SGD 13,000). Deposit: RMB 10,000; balance: RMB 62,000. No travel to Taiwan required — mail your 4 items and the ceremony is performed on your behalf. 10–12 clients share one dragon vein plot. Upgradeable to Lifetime at any time by paying the difference.

items.h3: Lifetime Premium Package: RMB 500,000 (Exclusive Plot, Deepest Effect)
items.content: Total fee: RMB 500,000. Personal attendance in Taiwan is mandatory for the full 2-day ceremony. You receive an exclusive individual plot — all earth qi is directed solely to you, making this the most powerful and lasting option. Ideal for those seeking comprehensive, lifelong destiny elevation.

After completing the 5-Year package, you can upgrade to Lifetime at any time by paying the difference of RMB 428,000. A new exclusive plot will be selected, and you will attend the full Lifetime ceremony in Taiwan.

sections.h2: What Is Included in the RMB 72,000 Fee

items.h3: Full 2-Day Ceremony Conducted by Master Lin Jia-Hua
items.content: Master Lin Jia-Hua (Taoist name: Lin Yi Chan), ordained by the 64th Zhang Tianshi in 2007, personally conducts the complete Sheng Ji ceremony: Day 1 rituals at the studio including disaster-dispelling, wealth-replenishment and empowerment rites; Day 2 at the dragon vein site including the core box-interment ceremony.

items.h3: Full HD Video Recording of the Entire Ceremony
items.content: The complete ceremony is filmed in HD and mailed to you after completion. You can verify every step — from opening prayers to the burial of your ceremonial box in the dragon vein — with nothing hidden or edited out.

items.h3: 3 Items Mailed Back to You After Completion
items.content: You receive: (1) your garment infused with the dragon vein's earth qi, which you can carry with you for ongoing energetic support; (2) a pure silver wealth ingot, empowered by Master Lin; (3) the full HD ceremony video recording.

items.h3: Step 1: Add WeChat NSDG521 and Confirm Your Booking
items.content: Contact Mr. Liang Dongrong via WeChat NSDG521. He will answer all your questions and confirm which package suits your needs. No pressure — all enquiries are confidential.

items.h3: Step 2: Pay RMB 10,000 Deposit to Begin the Process
items.content: Once you confirm your booking, pay the deposit of RMB 10,000. The agent then mails you the specialised collection kit with full preparation instructions.
